results.rendered_html:
parās 4 P.
1 To leave, give up, quit, abandon; parāstavasudhā sudhādhivasati  Ki. 5. 27. 
2 To expel.
3 To reject, repudiate; refute; iti yaduktaṃ tadapi parāstaṃ  S. D. 1.
